title: Software Engineer, Backend
score_reasoning: Your 7 years of backend experience and Python/Go skills directly address this role's core technical needs. However, the posting lists 4+ years as the target level, placing you at a senior-mid seniority mismatch. While your scope is demonstrably stronger (multi-tenant microservices, billing engines, migration leadership), the role emphasizes TypeScript and Scala experience with 'large, well-maintained codebases'—neither your primary languages, and TypeScript is not evidenced in your CV. The Warsaw hybrid location (Mon/Tue/Thu in-office) introduces the same cross-border friction as job #2, conflicting with your Berlin-anchored hybrid preference. The product-focused backend work (user-facing features) is a slight sideways move from your infrastructure and systems specialization, though still within backend domain.

red_flags: 4+ years is the posted target—you are significantly more senior; role may not offer growth
TypeScript and Scala required—not in your primary stack
Warsaw hybrid role—cross-border from Berlin base; not your preferred local setup
Product-centric backend vs. your infrastructure/systems specialization (sideways move)
